name: Wyrmwood
description: Two skeletons are standing here, their arms outstretched — one pointing east, one west. {{combat_update}}
combat_won_snippet: The broken bones of the two skeletons lie scattered. You might search them for anything left behind.

objects.name: skeleton remains
objects.description: The broken bones of the two skeleton lie scattered.
objects.description_snippet: Two shattered skeletons lie on the ground, their weapons and armour discarded.

on_interact.search: You rummage through the remains and find a few usable items.
